title: Femboy Cream
description: Eat or feed Femboy Cream to a player — they turn into a random femboy with heart particles. Guaranteed in every village chest.
body:
# Femboy Cream

A pink little jar found in village chests. Eat it — you turn into a femboy. Feed it to a friend — *they* turn into a femboy.

## How it works

- **Eat it** like food (right-click + hold). Your skin changes to a random one out of 18 cute femboy skins.
- **Feed someone else** by right-clicking another player while holding the jar.
- Hearts fly, sparkles pop, and everyone on the server sees the new look instantly.
- The new skin sticks across death, respawn and dimension changes. Your real Minecraft account skin isn't touched — it's just how you appear in-game.

## Where to find it

In **every village chest**. Guaranteed 1–2 per chest, every house and every job site (armorer, butcher, fisher, fletcher, mason, shepherd, toolsmith, weaponsmith, etc.).

## Commands

```
/femboycream reset <player>     turns one person back to normal
/femboycream reset all          turns everyone back to normal
```

Op only. Without the command you can just eat another jar to roll a new skin.

## Versions

Works on **Forge, NeoForge, Fabric and Quilt** for **Minecraft 1.20.1, 1.21.1 and 1.21.4**.

Fabric and Quilt builds need Fabric API installed.

Available in English and German.

Have fun.
